headline: Engineering Depth, Not Just Demos
bio: I'm a full-stack software engineer who thrives at the intersection of system design and hands-on implementation. I don't just build features — I architect systems that scale, handle edge cases gracefully, and ship with production-grade reliability.
pitch: What sets me apart is my end-to-end ownership mindset. From designing database schemas and caching strategies to crafting pixel-perfect UIs with smooth animations, I bring the full picture together. Every project I build is a system design exercise — with real users, real constraints, and real trade-offs.
differentiators: System Design Practitioner — I build what I design, from URL shorteners to distributed file systems
Production Mindset — Auth, caching, error handling, and monitoring are built-in, not afterthoughts
Full-Stack Fluency — Equally comfortable writing Express middleware and crafting React animations
Engineering Blog Approach — Each project comes with architecture decisions and trade-off analysis
